---
title: "The use of irradiation for production of oligochitosan conjugated with graphene oxide"
date: 2026-02-01
author:
  - name: De Oliveira Gonçalves, Karina
  - name: Duarte, Miguel
  - name: Vieira, Daniel Perez
  - name: Araújo, Sumair Gouveia
  - name: Landini, Liliane
  - name: Sakata, Solange Kazumi
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Journal of Radioanalytical and Nuclear Chemistry"
  volume: 335
  issue: 2
  doi: "10.1007/s10967-025-10555-8"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">The use of irradiation for production of oligochitosan conjugated with graphene oxide</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
